doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document purports to waive unauthorized practice restrictions for paralegals drafting motions without attorney pre-filing review, contradicting California's actual unauthorized practice statutes and State Bar ethics rules.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 87
REASON: The document claims paralegals can draft legal motions without pre-filing attorney review and that this doesn't constitute unauthorized practice—a position fundamentally contradicting California Business & Professions Code §6125 and established State Bar ethics, making this appear to be an invented document designed to misrepresent actual legal authority.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 87
REASON: The document purports to waive unauthorized practice restrictions for paralegals drafting motions without attorney pre-filing review, contradicting California's actual unauthorized practice statutes and State Bar ethics rules.
